alpha.desc: The alpha view shows the front of the residence and the primary approach from the driveway|A circular drive surrounds a landscaped island and provides access to the main structure and detached outbuilding|The property is surrounded by open terrain with scattered trees and shrubs.

bravo.desc: The bravo view shows the rear of the residence|Landscaped lawn areas border the structure and contrast with the surrounding native vegetation|The detached outbuilding and paved drive areas remain visible from this vantage point.

charlie.desc: The charlie view shows the western side of the residence and detached outbuilding|The circular driveway and landscaped entrance areas are visible, while the surrounding parcel remains largely undeveloped with sparse vegetation.

delta.desc: The delta view shows the eastern side of the residence|Lawn areas extend around portions of the structure and a vehicle is visible near the driveway|The property transitions quickly from maintained landscaping to native high-desert vegetation beyond the developed area.

nadir.desc: The nadir view shows a large residence situated near the center of an open parcel|A long paved driveway leads to a circular turnaround in front of the home|A detached outbuilding is located west of the residence, while maintained lawn areas surround portions of the structure|The remainder of the property consists primarily of native vegetation and open terrain.
